Commercial Cleaning in New Jersey

GreenPoint Maintenance Services provides MBE-certified commercial janitorial and facility maintenance across New Jersey. We serve 10 cities and surrounding areas with real-time JaniTrack cleaning verification.

Get an Instant Quote →Schedule Walkthrough
NJ Service Areas

Cities We Serve in New Jersey

Our dedicated teams provide consistent, verifiable cleaning services throughout New Jersey. Select a city below to learn about our services in your area.

✓
Newark — Essex County: Full commercial janitorial, disinfection, floor care, and facility maintenance services.
✓
Jersey City — Hudson County: Full commercial janitorial, disinfection, floor care, and facility maintenance services.
✓
Paterson — Passaic County: Full commercial janitorial, disinfection, floor care, and facility maintenance services.
✓
Elizabeth — Union County: Full commercial janitorial, disinfection, floor care, and facility maintenance services.
✓
Hackensack — Bergen County: Full commercial janitorial, disinfection, floor care, and facility maintenance services.
✓
Fort Lee — Bergen County: Full commercial janitorial, disinfection, floor care, and facility maintenance services.
✓
Hoboken — Hudson County: Full commercial janitorial, disinfection, floor care, and facility maintenance services.
✓
Clifton — Passaic County: Full commercial janitorial, disinfection, floor care, and facility maintenance services.
✓
Passaic — Passaic County: Full commercial janitorial, disinfection, floor care, and facility maintenance services.
✓
East Orange — Essex County: Full commercial janitorial, disinfection, floor care, and facility maintenance services.

Industries We Serve in New Jersey

We specialize in six core verticals across New Jersey, each with dedicated cleaning protocols designed for its specific compliance and safety requirements.

✓
Schools & Educational Facilities: CDC-compliant cleaning for K-12 schools, charter schools, private academies, and universities.
✓
Churches & Houses of Worship: Respectful, meticulous cleaning for sanctuaries, fellowship halls, nurseries, and administrative offices for congregations of all sizes.
✓
Healthcare & Medical Offices: OSHA-compliant terminal cleaning for medical offices, dental practices, outpatient clinics, urgent care centers, and long-term care facilities.
✓
Daycare & Childcare Centers: Specialized cleaning for infant rooms, toddler areas, and play spaces using exclusively non-toxic, eco-friendly products approved for environments with children.
✓
Government & Municipal Buildings: Secure, reliable cleaning for government offices, courthouses, community centers, and public facilities.
✓
Commercial Office Buildings: Comprehensive cleaning programs for single-tenant offices to multi-floor commercial properties including conference rooms, reception areas, and shared spaces.

Ready for a Cleaner Facility?

Get a complimentary facility walkthrough and customized cleaning proposal. No obligation.
